module: Marketplace Intelligence Graph + Seller/Buyer Command Center
summary: Main server.js already has dealer/seller-rate parsing, ecommerce hub, channel automation (Channel Automation Command Center), Flow Studio, AI provider layer, and an admin command dispatcher. The Marketplace Intelligence graph that unifies seller/buyer/SKU/price/stock signals across these does NOT exist and is the only thing built here.

areas.action: safe_to_extend via dealerAdapter; do not rebuild parsers

areas.existing: callAIProvider() in server.js, ai/ provider stack
areas.action: rule-based dry-run by default; live only when MARKETPLACE_INTELLIGENCE_AI_LIVE=true
add adminCommands.js parser and wire hook
export flowNodes.js registry entries + document integration point

duplicate_risk — DO NOT rebuild; consume products/orders via adapter
duplicate_risk — DO NOT rebuild; consume rates via adapter
